UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Jul-27-2016 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-27-2016 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: JPT: Anne Wong; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Pontar Real Estate Management Company is present. Represented by Mary Pontar.
Attorney Daniel Bornstein for the plaintiff.
Defendant Mark Dikman is present.
Attorney Erin Katayama appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of AUG-01-2016 is vacated. (501)
